para_trans: Major urban transport projects in Pune
and the formation of a committee for supervision.
Government Correctional Certificate No: PMC-2026 / Q.No.446 / NV-22
Reference: - Department of Urban Development, Government Decision No: PMC-2026 / Q.No.446 / NV-22,
Planning, financial management, implementation and execution of major urban transport projects in Pune.
As per the decision of the Government concerned for monitoring, Shri. Presided over by the Chief Minister
A high-level committee has been formed. in paragraph 2 of this Government Decision.
The High-Level Committee consists of Shri Murlidhar Mohol, Minister of State, Civil Aviation and Cooperation, India.
The government is being included as a member.
This government certificate is issued by the Government of Maharashtra under www.maharashtra.gov.in.
